title: mentha longifolia var. mollis
intro: Mentha longifolia var. mollis, also known as Horsemint or Pineapple Mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Mentha longifolia var. mollis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Horsemint can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
